transcript:
Hi everyone, I'm Prastut, founder of Asgard. Uh, today, taking a real position on-chain requires you to strap together multiple DeFi protocols and manage them through bots and spreadsheets. And over the last year, we spoke to professional retail traders, prop firms, liquid funds, and we felt that I wasn't alone in this pain. My work with Asgard aims to fix this.

So the first building block that we're building is a Credit Backed Position or CBPs. You deposit capital to Asgard, it figures out the most optimal credit line, and then builds the position through the deep spot liquidity that Solana has, all in one click.

Let me walk you through some use cases. So, every investor knows this feeling in Solana that your Solana is suddenly hit a price target that makes you salivate with greed, and all of your liquidity is tied up somewhere else. So a SOL CBP lets you put up a position uh where you can amplify your buying power. Then you could repay the credit line over time with your salary coming in, or you could use a portion of the position's upside to pay the loan back.

Uh here, I'm putting uh a $1,000 upfront and buying uh sorry, getting into a $2,000 BTC CBP position. Best part about CBPs is that I get to keep the asset yield which offsets the cost of my borrowing.

Here with 10k upfront, I'm buying a 30k I'm getting into a 30k INF CBP position. Here you can see I'm netting a 10% APY on top of that as well.

And you can help Vibhu fight the ETH maxis by opening up a SOL ETH CBP position, plus get positive carry on top.

Uh, you can also combine CBPs with your favorite perp protocol to execute capital efficient delta neutral strategies that nets you 20 to 30% APY, plus all the points underneath.

Uh, Credit Backed Positions unlock new ways to invest, strategize, and optimize assets and yields on Solana. Uh, we're building Asgard from ground up for institutional scale. If you're facing problems allocating to DeFi, I would love to talk to you.

Uh, power users have already opened $35 million worth of CBPs already. Uh, invite gated access is coming next week. Uh, please scan the QR code and we'd love to have you in our Discord. Thank you.

sources.title: Kraken to acquire Backed, accelerating xStocks expansion and unlocking global demand for tokenized equities
sources.snippet:
Kraken to acquire Backed, accelerating xStocks expansion and unlocking global demand for tokenized equities - Kraken Blog Kraken Blog
# [![Kraken Blog](https://i0.wp.com/blog.kraken.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/New-Lockups%402x.png?fit=214%2C64&ssl=1)](https://blog.kraken.com/)
[**](#)

**
[Sign in](https://www.kraken.com/sign-in)[Sign up](https://www.kraken.com/sign-up)
Search for:**×
December 2, 2025|[News](https://blog.kraken.com/category/news)
# Kraken to acquire Backed, accelerating xStocks expansion and unlocking global demand for tokenized equities
The Backed acquisition strengthens our tokenized asset leadership and marks a key milestone toward making global capital markets open, accessible and borderless.
### Share this:
* [Click to share on X (Opens in new window)X](https://blog.kraken.com/news/backed-acquisition?share=twitter)
* [Click to share on Facebook (Opens in new window)Facebook](https://blog.kraken.com/news/backed-acquisition?share=facebook)
* ![](https://i0.wp.com/blog.kraken.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/xStocks-Backed-Annoucement-Blog.png?fit=3070%2C1400&ssl=1)
We are excited to announce we have agreed to acquire[Backed Finance AG](https://backed.fi/), the company driving the issuance of[xStocks](https://xstocks.com/), the leading industry standard for tokenized equities. The acquisition will accelerate the global adoption of xStocks; unifying issuance, trading and settlement to power open capital markets infrastructure for everyone.
xStocks has seen exceptional adoption since its debut earlier in 2025, surpassing $10 billion in combined exchange and onchain trading volume within six months. This acquisition gives Backed access to the capital and resources needed to scale faster and capitalize on surging adoption and growing institutional demand for tokenized equities.
Bringing Backed fully into our ecosystem also allows greater alignment on strategy and investment priorities, unlocking the full economic potential of xStocks.
Together, Kraken and Backed will accelerate xStocks’ expansion, bringing tokenized equities to new markets and extending their reach into everyday financial experiences. The acquisition lays the groundwork for future innovation in tokenized assets beyond equities, advancing our leadership in building open, interoperable financial infrastructure.
xStocks currently offers exposure to more than 60 tokenized equities and ETFs backed 1:1 by the underlying asset. The tokens are live on Solana and Ethereum, with integrations on TON, Tron, Mantle and BNB Chain coming soon.
Investors can trade 24 hours a day, five days a week on Kraken, or directly onchain 24/7, creating a seamless, continuous bridge between traditional and crypto markets. xStocks can be self-custodied and were designed for multi-chain composability, keeping the infrastructure open and usable across the broader ecosystem.
Through the xStocks Alliance, Kraken and Backed have built a thriving ecosystem of partners spanning blockchain foundations, trading venues, and consumer applications. With this acquisition, we plan to further expand this ecosystem, enhancing interoperability and liquidity for tokenized equities across the industry.
**Arjun Sethi, Kraken Co-CEO**: “Integrating Backed into Kraken strengthens the core architecture required for open and programmable capital markets. Unifying issuance, trading and settlement under one framework ensures the infrastructure for tokenized assets remains transparent, reliable and globally accessible. This is foundational work for the next era of market structure. This is bigger than giving people exposure to U.S. equities, it’s about redefining what it means to own assets in the digital era.”
Backed’s team and infrastructure will become part of Kraken, strengthening issuance and compliance capabilities while expanding the reach and utility of tokenized assets beyond the crypto ecosystem

sources.title: J.P. Morgan Arranges Landmark U.S. Commercial Paper Issuance on Solana Public Blockchain for Galaxy Digital Holdings LP
sources.snippet:
J.P. Morgan Arranges Landmark U.S. Commercial Paper Issuance on Solana Public Blockchain for Galaxy Digital Holdings LP[Skip to content](#main)
Thursday 11 December 2025 5:02 pm
# J.P. Morgan Arranges Landmark U.S. Commercial Paper Issuance on Solana Public Blockchain for Galaxy Digital Holdings LP
![](https://www.cityam.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Screenshot-2025-10-14-at-9.28.36-am.png?w=95&h=95&crop=1)
By:[Business Wire](https://www.cityam.com/profile/businesswire/)
Share
* FacebookShare on Facebook
* XShare on Twitter
* LinkedInShare on LinkedIn
* WhatsAppShare on WhatsApp
* EmailShare on Email
J.P. Morgan announced today that it has successfully arranged a U.S. Commercial Paper (‘USCP’) issuance for Galaxy Digital Holdings LP, an affiliate of Galaxy Inc. (‘Galaxy’) on Solana, purchased by Coinbase Global Inc. (‘Coinbase’) and Franklin Templeton. The transaction is one of the earliest debt issuances ever executed on a public blockchain, and among the first in the U.S. to harness blockchain for the issuance and servicing of securities, marking a significant milestone for financial markets globally.
J.P. Morgan acted as Arranger, created the on-chain USCP token and facilitated the delivery-versus-payment settlement of the primary issuance. Both the issuance and redemption proceeds will be paid in USDC stablecoins issued by Circle, representing another market first for the USCP market.
**Scott Lucas, Head of Markets Digital Assets, J.P. Morgan says:**“Today’s transaction is an important step toward understanding the role blockchain will play in the future of financial markets. This trade demonstrates institutional appetite for digital assets and our capability to securely bring new instruments on-chain using Solana. As a client-centric business, we remain focused on meeting the evolving demand for digital asset exposure while preserving the integrity of traditional markets.”
J.P. Morgan continues to redefine what’s possible in digital assets, driving the future of finance with secure, scalable, and transparent solutions for institutional clients.
This milestone marks Galaxy’s first commercial paper issuance. The on-chain USCP format strengthens the firm’s short-term funding capabilities and opens access to a growing base of institutional investors incorporating blockchain-based money-market instruments into their portfolios. Galaxy’s Investment Banking Affiliate, Galaxy Digital Partners LLC, acted as Structuring Agent on the transaction, and the securities were purchased by Coinbase and Franklin Templeton.
Jason Urban, Global Head of Trading at Galaxy, says: “This issuance is a clear example of how public blockchains can improve the way capital markets operate. By bringing our first commercial paper offering on-chain and helping structure one of the earliest U.S. transactions of its kind, we’re putting into practice the model we’ve long believed in: open, programmable infrastructure that supports institutional-grade financial products. We’re pleased to collaborate with J.P. Morgan, Coinbase, Solana, and Franklin Templeton to help bring these innovations into everyday market activity.”
Sandy Kaul, Head of Innovation at Franklin Templeton, adds: “We’ve entered a new era where institutions are no longer just experimenting with blockchain—we’re transacting on it in a big way. This investment supporting the innovative work of the Galaxy team, and every new institutional deal with onchain issuance, accelerates our collective journey toward a more open, efficient, and resilient financial ecosystem.”
Nick Ducoff, Head of Institutional Growth, Solana Foundation, commented:****“This issuance marks a major step in bringing the security and efficiency of public blockchains to institutional finance. Solana’s architecture makes it possible for firms like J.P. Morgan to arrange fina

tags.impact_reason: Asgard's Credit Backed Positions offer a novel way to leverage assets and optimize yields on Solana, but its current impact is limited to power users and requires further adoption to be considered a major update.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a crystalline, monolithic fortress as the Semantic Anchor, directly inspired by the company's name, 'Asgard'. This represents the product's function: creating a single, secure, and powerful prime brokerage layer that rises above the chaos of fragmented DeFi protocols. The monolith visualizes the act of bundling disparate elements into a unified, institutional-grade structure. For the homepage text, I selected 'CBP' (Credit Backed Positions) because it's the fundamental building block of their new system, acting as a foundational label on this new architecture.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the base of the crystalline Asgard monolith. We witness a vortex of tangled, multi-colored light streams being absorbed into the intricate, geometric facets of the crystal. The camera captures the moment of transformation, showing the chaotic energy being refracted and organized internally, beginning to form a single, powerful, unified column of pure light. The texture of the crystal and the play of light within its depths are the central focus.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing on the base of the crystalline Asgard monolith. We witness a vortex of tangled, multi-colored holographic light streams being absorbed into the intricate, geometric facets of the crystal. The camera captures the moment of transformation, showing the chaotic energy being refracted and organized internally, beginning to form a single, powerful, unified column of pure light. The texture of the crystalline structure and the mesmerizing play of volumetric light within its depths are the central focus, rendered with ultra-photorealistic detail and realistic materials. The composition emphasizes symmetry and a central focus, utilizing a tight macro framing that fills the entire square aspect ratio frame with intricate textures and glowing details. The lighting is characterized by global illumination and cinematic contrast, showcasing every facet and the internal light organization. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering (PBR), volumetric lighting, global illumination, cinematic contrast, ultra-photorealistic.

editorial.headline: Asgard Debuts 'Credit Backed Positions' to Solve DeFi Fragmentation for Institutions
editorial.standfirst: Founder Prastut Kumar unveils a prime brokerage layer that bundles lending, borrowing, and execution into atomic positions, already attracting $35M in pre-public volume.
key_takeaways: $35M in volume processed during private beta, with backing from Robot Ventures and Solana Ventures.
New 'Credit Backed Position' (CBP) primitive allows one-click execution of complex leveraged and delta-neutral strategies.
Integrates deep spot liquidity with yield-bearing assets like Sanctum's INF to offset borrowing costs.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
For institutional allocators and prop desks, the friction of on-chain execution has long been a barrier to scale. Taking a simple leveraged position on Solana currently requires a fragmented workflow: managing collateral across lending markets, executing swaps via aggregators, and monitoring health factors through disparate dashboards. **Asgard** has emerged from stealth at Breakpoint 2025 to dismantle this fragmentation with its flagship primitive: the **Credit Backed Position (CBP)**.

Founder **Prastut Kumar** presented the protocol as a solution to the "spreadsheet and bot" fatigue plaguing professional traders. Unlike traditional money markets where borrowing and trading are distinct actions, Asgard's engine unifies them. Users deposit capital, and the protocol autonomously calculates the optimal credit line to construct a position using Solana's deep spot liquidity. This architecture effectively functions as an on-chain prime broker, abstracting the complexity of loop-based leverage into a single atomic transaction.

The alpha lies in Asgard's capital efficiency and yield optimization. Kumar demonstrated live strategies where the cost of borrowing is offset by the underlying asset's yield. For instance, an **INF CBP** (utilizing **Sanctum's** Infinity LST) allows traders to amplify exposure while netting a positive APY from the LST itself. Furthermore, the protocol supports automated delta-neutral strategies—combining spot purchases with perp shorts—that are currently yielding 20-30% APY plus incentives, a figure that will likely attract significant liquidity from yield-starved funds.

With **$35 million** in volume already processed by power users in private beta, Asgard is explicitly targeting the "institutional scale" market rather than retail speculators. The protocol's ability to facilitate complex trades—such as a **SOL/ETH** pair trade to capture relative strength—without forcing users to manage multiple debt positions suggests a maturity in Solana's DeFi stack. As invite-gated access opens next week, Asgard is positioned to become the execution layer of choice for sophisticated capital looking to deploy size on-chain.
